audience_policies.source_phrase: A one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2.00 per visitor over the age of 2.

coupon.source_phrase_block: A one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2.00 per visitor over the age of 2.
